dialogue.name: Diplomat
dialogue.speech: How much longer to the embassy?

dialogue.name: Driver
dialogue.speech: I believe it'll be around minutes, sir.

dialogue.name: Driver
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Driver
dialogue.speech: The brake's not working.

dialogue.name: Diplomat
dialogue.speech: Hey, you! Up front! Look up front!

dialogue.name: Member A
dialogue.speech: One of our diplomats perished in a car accident in Ostania.

dialogue.name: Member A
dialogue.speech: But we believe it to be an assassination by the East's far-right political party.

dialogue.name: Member A
dialogue.speech: They are plotting a w*r against our nation of Westalis.

dialogue.name: Member A
dialogue.speech: We must do everything we can to figure out their plan.

dialogue.name: Member B
dialogue.speech: Let's let him take care of it.

xml.narration: Proof that the foreign minister wears a toupee.

dialogue.name: Fake Edgar
dialogue.speech: Well done.

dialogue.name: Fake Edgar
dialogue.speech: Now we can force him to resign.

dialogue.name: Fake Edgar
dialogue.speech: I look forward to doing business with you again.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Hey.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: How about you hand over the goods now?

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Code name: Twilight.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: A spy.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: In an era in which the nations of the world were waging a fierce w*r

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: of information just out of sight,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: this man survived that b*ttlefield by being

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: a master of disguise, a man with a hundred faces.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: So Daddy's been in such a bad mood lately because someone

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: stole his toupee pictures, or something.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: What even? Ugh, I'm so mad.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: Hello? Are you even listening, Robert?

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Hm? Yes, that's rather unfortunate.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: So, Robert... Do you think one day we'll also—

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Karen, let's break up.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: I'm afraid I can't sense any intelligence in your conversations.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Farewell. May you find happiness.

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: Hey, Robert! Wait! You can't just do that to me!

dialogue.name: Karen
dialogue.speech: Robert!

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Sorry, Karen, but I have no further use for your family.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: As of tonight, I'm also done withthe mask known as Robert.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Marriage? Conventional happiness?

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: I got rid of those aspirations, as well as my identity, the day I became a spy.

dialogue.name: Contact
dialogue.speech: Meow.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Must be Cipher C.

dialogue.name: Train Announcer
dialogue.speech: The train bound for Berlint is now departing from track .

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Good day, or perhaps, good evening, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Well done on your last mission.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Thanks to you, the minister lived another day, to the great benefit of our country.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Now, then, I have your next mission.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Your target is the leader of the National Unity Party, Donovan Desmond.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He is a great threat to the truce between the East and the West.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Your mission is to get close to him and probe any seditious activities.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: In order to achieve this,

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: you will get married and have a child.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Sorry, what?!

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Desmond is an extremely cautious man who rarely appears in public.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: He only appears at social gatherings held at the elite private school his son attends.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: These events are informal get-togethers for the upper echelon of industrial and political leaders.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: You will have your child enroll in this school

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: and infiltrate one of the social gatherings.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: The enrollment deadline is drawing near, meaning you have one week to pull this off.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: You expect me to produce a child within seven days?!

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Please excuse me.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: This operation is the key to maintaining peace between East and West...

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: and perhaps, the world.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Hero who casts no shadow,

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: the great deeds you and your fellow agents do shall never see the light of day.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: You will never earn any medals nor make it into the papers.

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Even so...

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: Never forget that everyone else's day-to-day lives are possible

dialogue.name: Chief
dialogue.speech: because of your blood, sweat, and tears.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: Very well.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: I abandoned my identity when I became Twilight.

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: I will play the part of a father with a child if I must,

dialogue.name: Twilight
dialogue.speech: for the sake of a better world.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: OPERATION STRIX

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: This is one of our single-family apartments.

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: The unit comes furnished, includes central air conditioning and heating, and...

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: Um... Sir?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No wiretaps detected, and there are securable escape routes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll take it.

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: Excellent, Mr. Forger. Now, if you'd sign these documents...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Loid Forger. Occupation: psychiatrist.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's my new life.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: With a family I love and a happy home life...

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: How nice that you and your family are moving into a new home.

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: Do you have a boy or a girl?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah, well...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll be deciding on that soon.

dialogue.name: Real estate agent
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What an absolute burden for a spy.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Huh? You wanna adopt?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Indeed. I heard that your orphanage was looking for candidates.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You see, my wife and I—

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Yeah, sure. Take whichever one you want.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Come on in.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What a terrible environment.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But the shadier the establishment,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: the more likely these children have complicated pasts,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so it'll be easier to alter their stories.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can make this mission work if I have a child.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I would've preferred to handle it all on my own,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but I can't exactly disguise myself as a child,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: no matter how skilled a spy I am.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Pardon me. If possible, I'd like a child who can read and write.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Well, in that case...

dialogue.name: Orphanage director
dialogue.speech: Hey, Anya.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: She's the smartest one we've got.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: She don't talk much, but she's a good kid.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: She's a creepy, disgusting little brat.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: I'd be thrilled to get her outta my hair.

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Go on. Say hello.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er... Pardon me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If I recall, the earliest age students can enter Eden College is six.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She definitely looks no older than four or five.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Six.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm six!

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: You're six years old?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But she's so small...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hm? The paper?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A crossword puzzle?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's probably too difficult for a child.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Of course, for myself, it's mere child's play.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: One down is "homeostasis."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: One across is "causal closure."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The one below that is "symplectomorphism."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She completed it? Seriously?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Such unbelievable intellect.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She should have no problem passing the entrance exam.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll take her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As for the paperwork...

dialogue.name: Orphanage Director
dialogue.speech: Don't worry about that. Just take her already.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: My mission to end up with a child is a success.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Everything's going so well that it's making me nervous.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you okay with this?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A spy... mission...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So exciting!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: This little girl happened to be a telepath.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Test Subject .

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: She possessed the ability to read people's minds.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: She was unintentionally created in an experiment by a certain organization,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and she later fled their facility.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: She has been wandering around looking for someone to take care of her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, listen, little girl.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, listen, Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Starting today, you will be my daughter,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but if anyone asks, you've always been my daughter.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Got it?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Make sure you address me as "Father."

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Very well.

dialogue.name: Neighbor
dialogue.speech: Well, aren't you a cute little girl? Hello there.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're the Forgers. We just moved in today.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I am Anya. I have been Papa's child for a very long time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That wasn't necessary.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on, let's go inside.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Anya's house?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A TV!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Go ahead and turn it on.

dialogue.name: TV Announcer
dialogue.speech: Spy Wars, an adventure cartoon!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I like this show.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Of all things...

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: A g*n with a sil*ncer?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So exciting.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: You're a professional!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: First, I'll have to gather everything we'll need.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I will be taking back that b*mb.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And I'll have to forge an ID for her.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: Anyone who gets in my way will regret it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm going out for a bit.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Just sit there and watch your show.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: Out of my way!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: An adventure!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not going on an adventure. I'm just going shopping.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want a p*stol with a sil*ncer!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sure. Maybe if we can find one on sale.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To be a master spy,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: one must act normal and never draw attention to themselves.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We must do everything we can to look like an ordinary family.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! Save me!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Must you draw attention to yourself?

dialogue.name: Old Lady
dialogue.speech: Now, now. You need to make sure you hold the little one's hand.

dialogue.name: Old Lady
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Having one hand tied up will make it difficult to prepare for an enemy ambush,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but no matter.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: An enemy?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What are you doing?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hiding!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Did I do anything to make her want to hide from me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Perhaps I held her hand too early. Does she hate me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This isn't good.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to maintain a good relationship with her until the end of this mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I must know more about this creature.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's basic diplomacy. Understanding the other party is the first step toward peace.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Understanding me will lead to world peace?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I like peanuts.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: And I don't like carrots.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Uh-huh...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But I really like crispy bacon from bakenries!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's a "bakery." They do not sell bacon.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'd like this, please.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That costs one dalc. You can't buy it with a ten-pent coin.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is this girl actually stupid?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Was the crossword puzzle a fluke?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Maybe I can still go back and get another child—

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Pwease don't get rid of me!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's gotten into you?!

dialogue.name: Passerby
dialogue.speech: What a terrible parent.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Pwease! I'm a good bargain!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What do I do?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll buy you some peanuts! Just stop crying!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Peanuts!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, I'm tired.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Can't walk anymore...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This isn't working... I just don't understand

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: this irrational behavior.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need some manuals to help me understand it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "The key to raising a child is trust."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "Rather than scolding them, try tounderstand things from their perspective."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "Children are not very good at putting how they're feeling into words,

dialogue.name: sign___CHILDREARING,Sign
dialogue.speech: CHILDREARING

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so try to understand them more."So no interrogating them, then?

dialogue.name: sign___CHILDREARING,Sign
dialogue.speech: CHILDCARE

dialogue.name: sign___CHILDREARING,Sign
dialogue.speech: CHILDREARING

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Do the parents of the world

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: normally carry out such difficult missions all the time?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "Nurture their self-esteem to give them a better future."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "By giving them the ability to think for themselves, their future..."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As soon as I'm done with this mission, I'm sending her back to the orphanage.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's the extent of our relationship.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Don't wanna!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't wanna study!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to know how smart you are for this exam.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't need to study to do any tests.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If I just read other people's...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: ...people's minds...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you planning on cheating? Listen.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you don't get into this school...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: ...my mission fails.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Fine, then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm heading out.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're not coming with me today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No matter what.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're staying home.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I told you, you're not coming!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You there! Do you really think I don't see you?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is so good at finding me.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It's so much fun!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Try and get out of that!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: So that's why you're late?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In the end, I put up a barricade in front of the door and trapped her inside.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I'm praying that you don't get reported for child abuse.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Who knows what children are thinking?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Their method of always crying to get their way is truly annoying.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hate to tell you this, Twilight, but crying is their job.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: More importantly, here's what you asked for.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: An application, ticket for the exam, and exam questions.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I went through hell getting these for you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thanks, Franky.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I think we can make things work if we have her memorize everything.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Oh, yeah. About your daughter...

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I dug up some records on her past that the orphanage didn't have.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I couldn't find anything about her birth.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: No info on her age or parents, either.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I could only find information from the last year,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: but she's been adopted four times and returned each time.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: She's also been to two other orphanages.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "Anya Williams, Anya Levski, Anya Roche"...

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: She changes names as much as you do.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You guys are perfect for each other.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hey, I'm kidding. This is for your mission, right?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: She may be a kid, but no good's gonna come out of getting too attached.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thanks for the concern.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hello? Where's my money?!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Damn it... Who knows what spies are thinking, either?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm so bored. Spies aren't like what I thought.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I just want to get the b*mb back.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't have her messing with my spy equipment, so I'll lock it up.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The code is , ...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Bomby-bombs! Bomby-bombs!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Bomby-bombs! Bomby-bombs!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ooh!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Secret messages!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Secrets, secrets...

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: Boss! We've intercepted a new message.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Is it using the West's cipher?

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: No, it's just plain text.

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: It says... "Twilight here"...

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: Twilight here!

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: This is the frequency used by Western intelligence.

dialogue.name: Henchman A
dialogue.speech: Oh, there's more. "Catch me if you can"...

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Hurry up and pinpoint where it's coming from!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Whew...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now that you've found out I'm a spy, you'll have to disappear.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If he finds out I'm a telepath...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'll have to leave.

dialogue.name: flashback Researcher A
dialogue.speech: Anya, you mustn't tell anyone about your power.

dialogue.name: Researcher B
dialogue.speech: It's time to study now, Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But I wanna draw...

dialogue.name: Researcher A
dialogue.speech: Don't bother with childish games.

dialogue.name: Researcher A
dialogue.speech: We must use your power for the sake of world peace.

dialogue.name: Researcher A
dialogue.speech: There's no time for tears, either.

dialogue.name: Researcher A
dialogue.speech: Now, enough playing. Back to studying.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She'd better not have messed up the apartment.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, right. I need to move this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Who the hell are these guys?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's been kidnapped?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: By whoever sent these thugs? But why?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to find her immediately. Calm down.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: From the looks of it, I've been compromised.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to get to safety immediately.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As for Anya...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There are plenty of other children out there.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll start things over from square one and—

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: So who the hell is this kid?

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Could she be Twilight's?

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: No idea. She was in the room where the message came from,

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: so we snatched her just in case.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Because of the transmission?

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: She was holed up inside the apartment with a barricade out front.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Why out front?

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: Beats me.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Well, no matter. We might be able to use her as a hostage

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: in order to force Twilight to steal the toupee

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: off of the foreign minister's head personally.

dialogue.name: Henchman D
dialogue.speech: Boss, I think we should just give up on the toupee.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Transparency is essential in government.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Toupees are a no-go.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A p*stol with a sil*ncer...

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Also, the minister's a traitor who's been secretly backing the West.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Anyone who advocates for a traitor is also a traitor.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A real bad guy...

dialogue.name: Henchman G
dialogue.speech: Boss! Nguyen and his guys are back from the apartment!

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: We captured him.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Well done.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Those weren't the moves of an amateur. He's the real deal.

dialogue.name: Henchman E
dialogue.speech: Go rest over there.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Now then, Twilight...

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Let's have you return the photographs you stole from me.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Nguyen!

dialogue.name: Henchman E
dialogue.speech: What's going on?! He was just—

dialogue.name: Henchman C
dialogue.speech: The kid's gone!

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: He got me again!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This was a mistake.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I risked everything by waltzing right into enemy territory.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm a failure as a spy.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Pabwaaaaaah!

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Look, you're okay. I won't do anything.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: You don't have to be scared.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Pabwaaaaaah!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is exactly why kids suck.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I think I figured out why I hate the sound of kids crying so much.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Because I end up remembering my own childhood.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No one reached out their hand to save me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I felt alone, in despair, and so powerless that all I could do was cry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I thought I'd abandoned that past, but on a subconscious level,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: she was reminding me of me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, actually...

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Listen up, little girl.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Listen up, Anya.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Me and my friends are pro tag players.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Whenever we spot someone with potential, we immediately challenge them to a game.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Oh.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a liar.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Now, listen.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: If you go straight down this street and turn right,

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: you'll find a police station.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: If you can get this to a police officer, you win the game.

dialogue.name: Fake Nguyen
dialogue.speech: Got it?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you show them this, they'll put you in a better orphanage.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not going to involve a kid in this mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll figure something out and rework the plan.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Pa—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All right, go! Hurry!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm a failure as a spy? No.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: My mistake was putting that little girl in danger to begin with.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How could I forget?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To create a world where children won't have to cry...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's why I became a spy.

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: Don't let that b*stard get away!

dialogue.name: Henchman E
dialogue.speech: We're gonna drag him out here and expose his face to—

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: A trap? When did he—

dialogue.name: Henchman E
dialogue.speech: What is this? Flour?

dialogue.name: Henchman C
dialogue.speech: T-Twilight?!

dialogue.name: Henchman B
dialogue.speech: Don't shoot! This whole place will blow!

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Wha—

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: You've gotta be sh1tting me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Turn around, and I'll k*ll you.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Twilight...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Good day, or perhaps, good evening, Edgar.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How's Karen doing?

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: How do you know my daughter's name?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Of course I know. That's what spies do.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I know her height, weight, shoe size,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: her favorite foods, even how many moles are on her body.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Though it's nothing compared to your record, I know of her criminal activity, too.

dialogue.name: Edgar
dialogue.speech: Absurd! My daughter would never—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Edgar.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I also know how much you care about your daughter.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So listen carefully.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you wish for her to have any semblance of a normal life,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: you'll leave me the hell alone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you understand, go home right now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What are you—I mean,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: what are you doing outside the house?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I, uh, just happened to come here to shop,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but I guess they went out of business.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a huge liar.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I was playing tag with some old guys.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, I see. Did you have fun?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It was a little scary.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna go home.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: To our home, Papa.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you sure?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If you leave me behind, I'm going to cry.

dialogue.name: flashback Franky
dialogue.speech: She's been adopted four times and returned each time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya Williams... Anya Levski...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya Roche.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, let's go home, then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But that apartment is far too dangerous, so let's move.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I spotted a poisonous snake there yesterday.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't like snakes.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a huge liar...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But he's such a cool liar.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna live in a castle.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll see if one's listed.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Once we get to our new home, you've got to study.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Gwak!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This time, you just have to memorize all the answers.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It'll be easy.

dialogue.name: Invigilator
dialogue.speech: All right, begin!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm counting on you, Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You can do it.

dialogue.name: Child B
dialogue.speech: This is so hard!

dialogue.name: Child C
dialogue.speech: I don't know any of these answers!

dialogue.name: Child D
dialogue.speech: Um... eeny, meeny, miny, moe...

dialogue.name: Child E
dialogue.speech: Mommy...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's there! You passed!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You did it!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Did I do a good job?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You bet you did!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You—

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I relaxed for a second and all my pent-up exhaustion hit me at once.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! Don't leave me!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I... relaxed?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! You're going to make me cry!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I promise to be a good girl!Just come back to me!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What the hell is going on with me?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa died.

dialogue.name: Mailman
dialogue.speech: I've got some mail for you!

dialogue.name: Mailman
dialogue.speech: Is this the Forger residence?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Mailman
dialogue.speech: Could you give this to your mommy or daddy?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My mama doesn't exist.

dialogue.name: Mailman
dialogue.speech: Oh, really? I'm sorry...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! The mailman came.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What do you think you're doing?! Are you trying to k*ll me?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I actually fell asleep in front of someone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Unacceptable. I need to get a grip.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mail!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's a letter from Eden College.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: What's the matter, Papa?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "The second phase of the admission process is a family interview."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "It is mandatory that the applicant attend with both parents."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: "Absolutely no exceptions."

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But Mama doesn't exist.
